"").lower()\n        if entry_price == 0 or current_price == 0 or side not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Insufficient data for stop-loss check.")\n            return False\n\n self.logger.info(f"Stop-loss triggered for {side} position at price {current_price}.")\n        return stop_loss_triggered\n\n    def apply_take_profit(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n Uses polling via ccxt for CoinDCX Futures.\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, poll_interval: float = 2.0):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger("DataFeed")\n        self.symbols: List[str] = []\n        self.callbacks: List[Callable[[str], None]] = []\n        self.latest_data: Dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}\n        self.poll_interval = poll_interval\n        self._running = False\n        self._thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None\n        self._exchange: Optional[ccxt.coincdx] = None\n\n    def subscribe(self, symbols: List[str]):\n        """\n        Subscribe to a list of trading symbols.\n        """\n        self.symbols = list(set(self.symbols) | set(symbols))\n        self.logger.info(f"Subscribed to symbols: {self.symbols}")\n\n    def set_exchange(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx):\n        """\n        Set the ccxt exchange client for data fetching.\n        """\n        self._exchange = exchange\n\n    def get_latest(self, symbol: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Get the latest OHLCV data for a symbol.\n        """\n        if symbol in self.latest_data:\n            return self.latest_data[symbol]\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f"No data available for symbol: {symbol}")\n\n    def on_update(self, callback: Callable[[str], None]):\n        """\n        Register a callback to be called when new data is available for a symbol.\n        The callback receives the symbol as argument.\n        """\n        self.callbacks.append(callback)\n\n    def _fetch_ohlcv(self, symbol: str, timeframe: str = "1m", limit: int = 100) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Fetch OHLCV data for a symbol using ccxt.\n        """\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client not set in DataFeed.")\n        try:\n            ohlcv = self._exchange.fetch_ohlcv(symbol, timeframe=timeframe, limit=limit)\n            df = pd.DataFrame(ohlcv, columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"])\n            df["timestamp"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"], unit="ms")\n            return df\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"Error fetching OHLCV for {symbol}: {e}")\n            return pd.DataFrame(columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"])\n\n    def _polling_loop(self):\n        """\n        Polling loop to fetch data and trigger callbacks.\n        """\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed polling loop started.")\n        while self._running:\n            for symbol in self.symbols:\n                df = self._fetch_ohlcv(symbol)\n                if not df.empty:\n                    prev_df = self.latest_data.get(symbol)\n                    # Only trigger update if new data is available\n                    if prev_df is None or not df.equals(prev_df):\n                        self.latest_data[symbol] = df\n                        for cb in self.callbacks:\n                            try:\n                                cb(symbol)\n                            except Exception as e:\n                                self.logger.error(f"Error in data update callback for {symbol}: {e}")\n            time.sleep(self.poll_interval)\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed polling loop stopped.")\n\n    def start(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx = None):\n        """\n        Start the data feed polling loop in a background thread.\n        Optionally set the exchange client.\n        """\n        if exchange:\n            self.set_exchange(exchange)\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client must be set before starting DataFeed.")\n        if self._running:\n            self.logger.warning("DataFeed already running.")\n            return\n        self._running = True\n        self._thread = threading.Thread(target=self._polling_loop, daemon=True)\n        self._thread.start()\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed started.")\n\n    def stop(self):\n        """\n        Stop the data feed polling loop.\n        """\n        self._running = False\n        if self._thread:\n            self._thread.join()\n            self._thread = None\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed stopped.")\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. List[Dict[str, Any]] = []\n        self._alerts: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []\n        self._status: Dict[str, Any] = {\n            "running": True,\n            "last_trade": None,\n            "last_alert": None,\n            "start_time": time.time(),\n            "trade_count": 0,\n            "alert_count": 0,\n        }\n        self._lock = threading.Lock()\n\n    def log_trade(self, device_id]):\n            self.logger.error("Push notification settings are incomplete.")\n            return\n\n        payload = {\n            "api_key": push_api_key,\n            "device_id": device_id,\n            "title": title,\n            "message": msg\n        }\n\n        try:\n            response = requests.post(push_api_url, json=payload, timeout=10)\n            if response.status_code == 200:\n                self.logger.info(f"Push notification sent: {title} - {msg}")\n            else:\n                self.logger.error(f"Failed to send push notification: Default initial balance for backtest\n        self.final_balance: float = self.initial_balance\n        self.max_drawdown: float = 0.0\n        self.total_return: float = 0.0\n        self.win_rate: float = 0.0\n        self.total_trades: int = 0\n        self.profitable_trades: int = 0\n\n    def run(self, strategy: TrendStrategy, data: pd.DataFrame, risk: RiskManager) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Run backtest for the given strategy and data, using the provided risk manager.\n        :param strategy: TrendStrategy instance\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data\n        :param risk: RiskManager instance\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        balance = self.initial_balance\n        position = None\n        entry_price = 0.0\n        position_side = None\n        position_size = 0.0\n        self.trades = []\n        self.equity_curve = [balance]\n        self.max_drawdown = 0.0\n        self.total_trades = 0\n        self.profitable_trades = 0\n\n        for i in range(1, len(data)):\n            window = data.iloc[:i+1]\n            signal = strategy.generate_signal(window)\n            price = window["close"].iloc[-1]\n            timestamp = window["timestamp"].iloc[-1] if "timestamp" in window.columns else i\n\n            # Simulate position management\n            if position is None and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                # Open new position\n                position = {\n                    "side": signal,\n                    "entryPrice": price,\n                    "markPrice": price,\n                    "contracts": 1,\n                    "timestamp": timestamp\n                }\n                entry_price = price\n                position_side = signal\n                position_size = 1\n                self.total_trades += 1\n            elif position is not None:\n                # Update mark price\n                position["markPrice"] = price\n\n                # Check for stop-loss/take-profit\n                stop_loss_triggered = risk.apply_stop_loss(position)\n                take_profit_triggered = risk.apply_take_profit(position)\n\n                # Close position if triggered or opposite signal\n                close_position = False\n                reason = ""\n                if stop_loss_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "stop_loss"\n                elif take_profit_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "take_profit"\n                elif signal != position_side and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "signal_flip"\n\n                if close_position:\n                    # Calculate PnL\n                    pnl = 0.0\n                    if position_side == "long":\n                        pnl = (price - entry_price) * position_size\n                    elif position_side == "short":\n                        pnl = (entry_price - price) * position_size\n                    balance += pnl\n                    self.trades.append({\n                        "entry_price": entry_price,\n                        "exit_price": price,\n                        "side": position_side,\n                        "pnl": pnl,\n                        "reason": reason,\n                        "entry_time": position["timestamp"],\n                        "exit_time": timestamp\n                    })\n                    if pnl > 0:\n                        self.profitable_trades += 1\n                    position = None\n                    entry_price = 0.0\n                    position_side = None\n                    position_size = 0.0\n\n            self.equity_curve.append(balance)\n            # Update max drawdown\n            peak = max(self.equity_curve)\n            drawdown = (peak - balance) / peak if peak > 0 else 0\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.max_drawdown = drawdown\n\n        self.final_balance = balance\n        self.total_return = (self.final_balance - self.initial_balance) / self.initial_balance\n        self.win_rate = (self.profitable_trades / self.total_trades) if self.total_trades > 0 else 0.0\n\n        self.results = {\n            "initial_balance": self.initial_balance,\n            "final_balance": self.final_balance,\n            "total_return": self.total_return,\n            "max_drawdown": self.max_drawdown,\n            "total_trades": self.total_trades,\n            "win_rate": self.win_rate,\n            "trades": self.trades,\n            "equity_curve": self.equity_curve\n        }\n        return self.results\n\n    def report(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Return the backtest results.\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        return self.results\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. from typing import Optional, List, Literal
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from datetime import datetime

class Position(BaseModel):
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Trading symbol, e.g., 'BTC/USDT'")
    side: Literal["long", "short"] = Field(..., description="Position side")
    entryPrice: float = Field(..., description="Entry price of the position")
    markPrice: float = Field(..., description="Current mark price")
    contracts: float = Field(..., description="Number of contracts/position size")
    timestamp: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Time when position was opened")
    unrealizedPnl: Optional[float] = Field(0.0, description="Unrealized PnL for the position")

class Trade(BaseModel):
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Trading symbol")
    side: Literal["long", "short"] = Field(..., description="Trade side")
    entry_price: float = Field(..., description="Entry price")
    exit_price: float = Field(..., description="Exit price")
    pnl: float = Field(..., description="Profit and loss for the trade")
    reason: str = Field(..., description="Reason for trade exit (stop_loss, take_profit, signal_flip, manual, etc.)")
    entry_time: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Trade entry time")
    exit_time: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Trade exit time")

class Alert(BaseModel):
    timestamp: datetime = Field(..., description="Time of alert")
    event: str = Field(..., description="Alert event description")
    level: Literal["info", "warning", "error"] = Field("info", description="Alert level")

class BotStatus(BaseModel):
    running: bool = Field(..., description="Is the bot running")
    last_trade: Optional[Trade] = Field(None, description="Last trade executed")
    last_alert: Optional[Alert] = Field(None, description="Last alert sent")
    start_time: datetime = Field(..., description="Bot start time")
    trade_count: int = Field(0, description="Total number of trades")
    alert_count: int = Field(0, description="Total number of alerts")
    uptime_sec: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Bot uptime in seconds")

class BacktestResult(BaseModel):
    initial_balance: float = Field(..., description="Initial balance for backtest")
    final_balance: float = Field(..., description="Final balance after backtest")
    total_return: float = Field(..., description="Total return percentage")
    max_drawdown: float = Field(..., description="Maximum drawdown percentage")
    total_trades: int = Field(..., description="Total number of trades")
    win_rate: float = Field(..., description="Win rate percentage")
    trades: List[Trade] = Field(default_factory=list, description="List of trades executed")
    equity_curve: List[float] = Field(default_factory=list, description="Equity curve over time")

Load configuration\n    config_path = "config.json"\n    try:\n        config = BotConfig.load(config_path)\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f"Failed to load config: {e}")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Initialize Exchange\n    exchange = Exchange()\n    try:\n        exchange.connect(config.api_key, config.api_secret)\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f"Failed to connect to exchange: {e}")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Initialize Strategy\n    strategy = TrendStrategy(config.strategy_params)\n\n    # Initialize Risk Manager\n    risk_manager = RiskManager(config.risk_params)\n\n    # Initialize Data Feed\n    data_feed = DataFeed()\n    data_feed.subscribe(config.assets)\n\n    # Initialize Monitor and Notifier\n    monitor = Monitor()\n    notifier = Notifier(config.notification_settings)\n\n    async def on_data_update(symbol: str):\n        try:\n            data = data_feed.get_latest(symbol)\n            signal = strategy.generate_signal(data)\n            positions = exchange.get_positions()\n            position = next((p for p in positions if p[\'symbol\'] == symbol), None)\n\n            risk_ok = risk_manager.check_risk(position, signal)\n            if risk_ok:\n                # Determine order parameters\n                side = "buy" if signal == "long" else "sell"\n                qty = config.strategy_params.get("position_size", 1.0)\n                price = data.iloc[-1]["close"]\n                order_type = config.strategy_params.get("order_type", "market")\n                order = exchange.place_order(symbol, side, qty, price, order_type)\n                monitor.log_trade(order)\n                notifier.send_push(f"Trade executed: {order}")\n            else:\n                monitor.alert(f"Risk check failed for {symbol} with signal {signal}")\n                notifier.send_push(f"Risk event: {symbol} signal {signal} blocked by risk manager")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"Error in data update for {symbol}: {e}")\n\n    # Register callback for data updates\n    data_feed.on_update(on_data_update)\n\n    # Main event loop\n    logger.info("Custom Trading Bot started.")\n    try:\n        while True:\n            await asyncio.sleep(1)\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        logger.info("Bot stopped by user.")\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f"Bot encountered an error: {e}")\n\nif __name__ == "__main__":\n    asyncio.run(main())\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. Default to EMA\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", {})\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", {"buy": 0, "sell": 0})\n        self.last_signal: Optional[str] = None\n\n    def update_params(self, params: Dict[str, Any]):\n        self.params.update(params)\n        self.indicator = self.params.get("indicator", self.indicator)\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", self.indicator_params)\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", self.signal_thresholds)\n\n    def generate_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        """\n        Generate trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\') based on selected trend indicator.\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data, must contain \'close\' column.\n        :return: Signal string\n        """\n        if data is None or len(data) < 2 or "close" not in data.columns:\n            return "neutral"\n\n        if self.indicator == "EMA":\n            return self._ema_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "SMA":\n            return self._sma_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "MACD":\n            return self._macd_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "RSI":\n            return self._rsi_signal(data)\n        else:\n            # Default fallback\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _ema_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        ema = data["close"].ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_ema = ema.iloc[-2]\n        curr_ema = ema.iloc[-1]\n        # Signal: price crosses above EMA -> long, below -> short\n        if price > curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_ema:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_ema:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _sma_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        sma = data["close"].rolling(window=period).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_sma = sma.iloc[-2]\n        curr_sma = sma.iloc[-1]\n        if price > curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_sma:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_sma:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _macd_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        fast_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("fast_period", 12))\n        slow_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("slow_period", 26))\n        signal_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("signal_period", 9))\n        close = data["close"]\n        ema_fast = close.ewm(span=fast_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        ema_slow = close.ewm(span=slow_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        macd = ema_fast - ema_slow\n        signal = macd.ewm(span=signal_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        prev_macd = macd.iloc[-2] - signal.iloc[-2]\n        curr_macd = macd.iloc[-1] - signal.iloc[-1]\n        # MACD crosses above signal -> long, below -> short\n        if prev_macd < 0 and curr_macd > 0:\n            return "long"\n        elif prev_macd > 0 and curr_macd < 0:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _rsi_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 14))\n        close = data["close"]\n        delta = close.diff()\n        gain = (delta.where(delta > 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        loss = (-delta.where(delta < 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        rs = gain / (loss + 1e-9)\n        rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))\n        curr_rsi = rsi.iloc[-1]\n        buy_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("buy", 30))\n        sell_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("sell", 70))\n        if curr_rsi < buy_th:\n            return "long"\n        elif curr_rsi > sell_th:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. None if no position)\n        :param signal: Trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\')\n        :return: True if trade is allowed, False otherwise\n        """\n        # If no signal, do not trade\n        if signal not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Signal is neutral, no trade.")\n            return False\n\n        # If no position, allow trade\n        if position is None:\n            self.logger.info("No open position, trade allowed.")\n            return True\n\n        # Check position size\n        position_size = float(position.get("contracts", 0))\n 0\n        if entry_value > 0:\n            drawdown = -unrealized_pnl / entry_value\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.logger.warning(f"Drawdown {drawdown:.2%} "").lower()\n        if entry_price == 0 or current_price == 0 or side not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Insufficient data for stop-loss check.")\n            return False\n\n "short":\n            if (entry_price / current_price - 1) <= -self.stop_loss_pct:\n                stop_loss_triggered = True\n\n        if stop_loss_triggered:\n            self.logger.info(f"Stop-loss triggered for {side} position at price {current_price}.")\n        return stop_loss_triggered\n\n    def apply_take_profit(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n Uses polling via ccxt for CoinDCX Futures.\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, poll_interval: float = 2.0):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger("DataFeed")\n        self.symbols: List[str] = []\n        self.callbacks: List[Callable[[str], None]] = []\n        self.latest_data: Dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}\n        self.poll_interval = poll_interval\n        self._running = False\n        self._thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None\n        self._exchange: Optional[ccxt.coincdx] = None\n\n    def subscribe(self, symbols: List[str]):\n        """\n        Subscribe to a list of trading symbols.\n        """\n        self.symbols = list(set(self.symbols) | set(symbols))\n        self.logger.info(f"Subscribed to symbols: {self.symbols}")\n\n    def set_exchange(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx):\n        """\n        Set the ccxt exchange client for data fetching.\n        """\n        self._exchange = exchange\n\n    def get_latest(self, symbol: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Get the latest OHLCV data for a symbol.\n        """\n        if symbol in self.latest_data:\n            return self.latest_data[symbol]\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f"No data available for symbol: {symbol}")\n\n    def on_update(self, callback: Callable[[str], None]):\n        """\n        Register a callback to be called when new data is available for a symbol.\n        The callback receives the symbol as argument.\n        """\n        self.callbacks.append(callback)\n\n    def _fetch_ohlcv(self, symbol: str, timeframe: str = "1m", limit: int = 100) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Fetch OHLCV data for a symbol using ccxt.\n        """\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client not set in DataFeed.")\n        try:\n            ohlcv = self._exchange.fetch_ohlcv(symbol, timeframe=timeframe, limit=limit)\n            df = pd.DataFrame(ohlcv, columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"])\n            df["timestamp"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"], unit="ms")\n            return df\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"Error fetching OHLCV for {symbol}: {e}")\n            return pd.DataFrame(columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"])\n\n    def _polling_loop(self):\n        """\n        Polling loop to fetch data and trigger callbacks.\n        """\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed polling loop started.")\n        while self._running:\n            for symbol in self.symbols:\n                df = self._fetch_ohlcv(symbol)\n                if not df.empty:\n                    prev_df = self.latest_data.get(symbol)\n                    # Only trigger update if new data is available\n                    if prev_df is None or not df.equals(prev_df):\n                        self.latest_data[symbol] = df\n                        for cb in self.callbacks:\n                            try:\n                                cb(symbol)\n                            except Exception as e:\n                                self.logger.error(f"Error in data update callback for {symbol}: {e}")\n            time.sleep(self.poll_interval)\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed polling loop stopped.")\n\n    def start(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx = None):\n        """\n        Start the data feed polling loop in a background thread.\n        Optionally set the exchange client.\n        """\n        if exchange:\n            self.set_exchange(exchange)\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client must be set before starting DataFeed.")\n        if self._running:\n            self.logger.warning("DataFeed already running.")\n            return\n        self._running = True\n        self._thread = threading.Thread(target=self._polling_loop, daemon=True)\n        self._thread.start()\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed started.")\n\n    def Default initial balance for backtest\n        self.final_balance: float = self.initial_balance\n        self.max_drawdown: float = 0.0\n        self.total_return: float = 0.0\n        self.win_rate: float = 0.0\n        self.total_trades: int = 0\n        self.profitable_trades: int = 0\n\n    def run(self, strategy: TrendStrategy, data: pd.DataFrame, risk: RiskManager) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Run backtest for the given strategy and data, using the provided risk manager.\n        :param strategy: TrendStrategy instance\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data\n        :param risk: RiskManager instance\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        balance = self.initial_balance\n        position = None\n        entry_price = 0.0\n        position_side = None\n        position_size = 0.0\n        self.trades = []\n        self.equity_curve = [balance]\n        self.max_drawdown = 0.0\n        self.total_trades = 0\n        self.profitable_trades = 0\n\n        for i in range(1, len(data)):\n            window = data.iloc[:i+1]\n            signal = strategy.generate_signal(window)\n            price = window["close"].iloc[-1]\n            timestamp = window["timestamp"].iloc[-1] if "timestamp" in window.columns else i\n\n            # Simulate position management\n            if position is None and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                # Open new position\n                position = {\n                    "side": signal,\n                    "entryPrice": price,\n                    "markPrice": price,\n                    "contracts": 1,\n                    "timestamp": timestamp\n                }\n                entry_price = price\n                position_side = signal\n                position_size = 1\n                self.total_trades += 1\n            elif position is not None:\n                # Update mark price\n                position["markPrice"] = price\n\n                # Check for stop-loss/take-profit\n                stop_loss_triggered = risk.apply_stop_loss(position)\n                take_profit_triggered = risk.apply_take_profit(position)\n\n                # Close position if triggered or opposite signal\n                close_position = False\n                reason = ""\n                if stop_loss_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "stop_loss"\n                elif take_profit_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "take_profit"\n                elif signal != position_side and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "signal_flip"\n\n                if close_position:\n                    # Calculate PnL\n                    pnl = 0.0\n                    if position_side == "long":\n                        pnl = (price - entry_price) * position_size\n                    elif position_side == "short":\n                        pnl = (entry_price - price) * position_size\n                    balance += pnl\n                    self.trades.append({\n                        "entry_price": entry_price,\n                        "exit_price": price,\n                        "side": position_side,\n                        "pnl": pnl,\n                        "reason": reason,\n                        "entry_time": position["timestamp"],\n                        "exit_time": timestamp\n                    })\n                    if pnl > 0:\n                        self.profitable_trades += 1\n                    position = None\n                    entry_price = 0.0\n                    position_side = None\n                    position_size = 0.0\n\n            self.equity_curve.append(balance)\n            # Update max drawdown\n            peak = max(self.equity_curve)\n            drawdown = (peak - balance) / peak if peak > 0 else 0\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.max_drawdown = drawdown\n\n        self.final_balance = balance\n        self.total_return = (self.final_balance - self.initial_balance) / self.initial_balance\n        self.win_rate = (self.profitable_trades / self.total_trades) if self.total_trades > 0 else 0.0\n\n        self.results = {\n            "initial_balance": self.initial_balance,\n            "final_balance": self.final_balance,\n            "total_return": self.total_return,\n            "max_drawdown": self.max_drawdown,\n            "total_trades": self.total_trades,\n            "win_rate": self.win_rate,\n            "trades": self.trades,\n            "equity_curve": self.equity_curve\n        }\n        return self.results\n\n    def report(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Return the backtest results.\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        return self.results\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. Load configuration\n    config_path = "config.json"\n    try:\n        config = BotConfig.load(config_path)\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f"Failed to load config: {e}")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Initialize Exchange\n    exchange = Exchange()\n    try:\n        exchange.connect(config.api_key, config.api_secret)\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f"Failed to connect to exchange: {e}")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Initialize Strategy\n    strategy = TrendStrategy(config.strategy_params)\n\n    # Initialize Risk Manager\n    risk_manager = RiskManager(config.risk_params)\n\n    # Initialize Data Feed\n    data_feed = DataFeed()\n    data_feed.subscribe(config.assets)\n\n    # Initialize Monitor and Notifier\n    monitor = Monitor()\n    notifier = Notifier(config.notification_settings)\n\n    async def on_data_update(symbol: str):\n        try:\n            data = data_feed.get_latest(symbol)\n            signal = strategy.generate_signal(data)\n            positions = exchange.get_positions()\n            position = next((p for p in positions if p[\'symbol\'] == symbol), None)\n\n            risk_ok = risk_manager.check_risk(position, signal)\n            if risk_ok:\n                # Determine order parameters\n                side = "buy" if signal == "long" else "sell"\n                qty = config.strategy_params.get("position_size", 1.0)\n                price = data.iloc[-1]["close"]\n                order_type = config.strategy_params.get("order_type", "market")\n                order = exchange.place_order(symbol, side, qty, price, order_type)\n                monitor.log_trade(order)\n                notifier.send_push(f"Trade executed: {order}")\n            else:\n                monitor.alert(f"Risk check failed for {symbol} with signal {signal}")\n                notifier.send_push(f"Risk event: {symbol} signal {signal} blocked by risk manager")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"Error in data update for {symbol}: {e}")\n\n    # Default to EMA\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", {})\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", {"buy": 0, "sell": 0})\n        self.last_signal: Optional[str] = None\n\n    def update_params(self, params: Dict[str, Any]):\n        self.params.update(params)\n        self.indicator = self.params.get("indicator", self.indicator)\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", self.indicator_params)\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", self.signal_thresholds)\n\n    def generate_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        """\n        Generate trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\') based on selected trend indicator.\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data, must contain \'close\' column.\n        :return: Signal string\n        """\n        if data is None or len(data) < 2 or "close" not in data.columns:\n            return "neutral"\n\n        if self.indicator == "EMA":\n            return self._ema_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "SMA":\n            return self._sma_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "MACD":\n            return self._macd_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "RSI":\n            return self._rsi_signal(data)\n        else:\n            # Default fallback\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _ema_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        ema = data["close"].ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_ema = ema.iloc[-2]\n        curr_ema = ema.iloc[-1]\n        # Signal: price crosses above EMA -> long, below -> short\n        if price > curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_ema:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_ema:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _sma_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        sma = data["close"].rolling(window=period).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_sma = sma.iloc[-2]\n        curr_sma = sma.iloc[-1]\n        if price > curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_sma:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_sma:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _macd_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        fast_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("fast_period", 12))\n        slow_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("slow_period", 26))\n        signal_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("signal_period", 9))\n        close = data["close"]\n        ema_fast = close.ewm(span=fast_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        ema_slow = close.ewm(span=slow_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        macd = ema_fast - ema_slow\n        signal = macd.ewm(span=signal_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        prev_macd = macd.iloc[-2] - signal.iloc[-2]\n        curr_macd = macd.iloc[-1] - signal.iloc[-1]\n        # MACD crosses above signal -> long, below -> short\n        if prev_macd < 0 and curr_macd > 0:\n            return "long"\n        elif prev_macd > 0 and curr_macd < 0:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _rsi_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 14))\n        close = data["close"]\n        delta = close.diff()\n        gain = (delta.where(delta > 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        loss = (-delta.where(delta < 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        rs = gain / (loss + 1e-9)\n        rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))\n        curr_rsi = rsi.iloc[-1]\n        buy_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("buy", 30))\n        sell_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("sell", 70))\n        if curr_rsi < buy_th:\n            return "long"\n        elif curr_rsi > sell_th:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. apply_take_profit methods.\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, params: Dict[str, Any]):\n        self.params = params.copy()\n        self.max_drawdown = float(self.params.get("max_drawdown", 0.2))  # 20% default\n        self.stop_loss_pct = float(self.params.get("stop_loss_pct", 0.05))  # 5% default\n        self.take_profit_pct = float(self.params.get("take_profit_pct", 0.1))  # 10% default\n        self.max_position_size = float(self.params.get("max_position_size", 1.0))  # 1 contract default\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger("RiskManager")\n\n    def check_risk(self, position: Optional[Dict[str, Any]], signal: str) -> bool:\n        """\n        Check if a new trade is allowed based on risk parameters.\n        :param position: Current position dict for the symbol (can be None if no position)\n        :param signal: Trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\')\n        :return: True if trade is allowed, False otherwise\n        """\n        # If no signal, do not trade\n        if signal not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Signal is neutral, no trade.")\n            return False\n\n        # If no position, allow trade\n        if position is None:\n            self.logger.info("No open position, trade allowed.")\n            return True\n\n        # Check position size\n        position_size = float(position.get("contracts", 0))\n        if position_size >= self.max_position_size:\n            self.logger.warning(f"Position size {position_size} exceeds max {self.max_position_size}.")\n            return False\n\n        # Check drawdown (if available)\n        unrealized_pnl = float(position.get("unrealizedPnl", 0))\n        entry_value = float(position.get("entryPrice", 0)) * position_size if position.get("entryPrice") else 0\n        if entry_value > 0:\n            drawdown = -unrealized_pnl / entry_value\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.logger.warning(f"Drawdown {drawdown:.2%} exceeds max {self.max_drawdown:.2%}.")\n                return False\n\n        self.logger.info("Risk check passed, trade allowed.")\n        return True\n\n    def apply_stop_loss(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n        """\n        Check if stop-loss should be triggered for the position.\n        :param position: Current position dict\n        :return: True if stop-loss should be triggered, False otherwise\n        """\n        entry_price = float(position.get("entryPrice", 0))\n        current_price = float(position.get("markPrice", 0))\n        side = position.get("side", "").lower()\n        if entry_price == 0 or current_price == 0 or side not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Insufficient data for stop-loss check.")\n            return False\n\n        stop_loss_triggered = False\n        if side == "long":\n            if (current_price / entry_price - 1) <= -self.stop_loss_pct:\n                stop_loss_triggered = True\n        elif side == "short":\n            if (entry_price / current_price - 1) <= -self.stop_loss_pct:\n                stop_loss_triggered = True\n\n        if stop_loss_triggered:\n            self.logger.info(f"Stop-loss triggered for {side} position at price {current_price}.")\n        return stop_loss_triggered\n\n    def apply_take_profit(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n        """\n        Check if take-profit should be triggered for the position.\n        :param position: Current position dict\n        :return: True if take-profit should be triggered, False otherwise\n        """\n        entry_price = float(position.get("entryPrice", 0))\n        current_price = float(position.get("markPrice", 0))\n        side = position.get("side", "").lower()\n        if entry_price == 0 or current_price == 0 or side not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Insufficient data for take-profit check.")\n            return False\n\n        take_profit_triggered = False\n        if side == "long":\n            if (current_price / entry_price - 1) >= self.take_profit_pct:\n                take_profit_triggered = True\n        elif side == "short":\n            if (entry_price / current_price - 1) >= self.take_profit_pct:\n                take_profit_triggered = True\n\n        if take_profit_triggered:\n            self.logger.info(f"Take-profit triggered for {side} position at price {current_price}.")\n        return take_profit_triggered\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. Uses polling via ccxt for CoinDCX Futures.\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, poll_interval: float = 2.0):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger("DataFeed")\n        self.symbols: List[str] = []\n        self.callbacks: List[Callable[[str], None]] = []\n        self.latest_data: Dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}\n        self.poll_interval = poll_interval\n        self._running = False\n        self._thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None\n        self._exchange: Optional[ccxt.coincdx] = None\n\n    def subscribe(self, symbols: List[str]):\n        """\n        Subscribe to a list of trading symbols.\n        """\n        self.symbols = list(set(self.symbols) | set(symbols))\n        self.logger.info(f"Subscribed to symbols: {self.symbols}")\n\n    def set_exchange(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx):\n        """\n        Set the ccxt exchange client for data fetching.\n        """\n        self._exchange = exchange\n\n    def get_latest(self, symbol: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Get the latest OHLCV data for a symbol.\n        """\n        if symbol in self.latest_data:\n            return self.latest_data[symbol]\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f"No data available for symbol: {symbol}")\n\n    def on_update(self, callback: Callable[[str], None]):\n        """\n        Register a callback to be called when new data is available for a symbol.\n        The callback receives the symbol as argument.\n        """\n        self.callbacks.append(callback)\n\n    def _fetch_ohlcv(self, symbol: str, timeframe: str = "1m", limit: int = 100) -> Default initial balance for backtest\n        self.final_balance: float = self.initial_balance\n        self.max_drawdown: float = 0.0\n        self.total_return: float = 0.0\n        self.win_rate: float = 0.0\n        self.total_trades: int = 0\n        self.profitable_trades: int = 0\n\n    def run(self, strategy: TrendStrategy, data: pd.DataFrame, risk: RiskManager) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Run backtest for the given strategy and data, using the provided risk manager.\n        :param strategy: TrendStrategy instance\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data\n        :param risk: RiskManager instance\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        balance = self.initial_balance\n        position = None\n        entry_price = 0.0\n        position_side = None\n        position_size = 0.0\n        self.trades = []\n        self.equity_curve = [balance]\n        self.max_drawdown = 0.0\n        self.total_trades = 0\n        self.profitable_trades = 0\n\n        for i in range(1, len(data)):\n            window = data.iloc[:i+1]\n            signal = strategy.generate_signal(window)\n            price = window["close"].iloc[-1]\n            timestamp = window["timestamp"].iloc[-1] if "timestamp" in window.columns else i\n\n            # Simulate position management\n            if position is None and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                # Open new position\n                position = {\n                    "side": signal,\n                    "entryPrice": price,\n                    "markPrice": price,\n                    "contracts": 1,\n                    "timestamp": timestamp\n                }\n                entry_price = price\n                position_side = signal\n                position_size = 1\n                self.total_trades += 1\n            elif position is not None:\n                # Update mark price\n                position["markPrice"] = price\n\n                # Check for stop-loss/take-profit\n                stop_loss_triggered = risk.apply_stop_loss(position)\n                take_profit_triggered = risk.apply_take_profit(position)\n\n                # Close position if triggered or opposite signal\n                close_position = False\n                reason = ""\n                if stop_loss_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "stop_loss"\n                elif take_profit_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "take_profit"\n                elif signal != position_side and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "signal_flip"\n\n                if close_position:\n                    # Calculate PnL\n                    pnl = 0.0\n                    if position_side == "long":\n                        pnl = (price - entry_price) * position_size\n                    elif position_side == "short":\n                        pnl = (entry_price - price) * position_size\n                    balance += pnl\n                    self.trades.append({\n                        "entry_price": entry_price,\n                        "exit_price": price,\n                        "side": position_side,\n                        "pnl": pnl,\n                        "reason": reason,\n                        "entry_time": position["timestamp"],\n                        "exit_time": timestamp\n                    })\n                    if pnl > 0:\n                        self.profitable_trades += 1\n                    position = None\n                    entry_price = 0.0\n                    position_side = None\n                    position_size = 0.0\n\n            self.equity_curve.append(balance)\n            # Update max drawdown\n            peak = max(self.equity_curve)\n            drawdown = (peak - balance) / peak if peak > 0 else 0\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.max_drawdown = drawdown\n\n        self.final_balance = balance\n        self.total_return = (self.final_balance - self.initial_balance) / self.initial_balance\n        self.win_rate = (self.profitable_trades / self.total_trades) if self.total_trades > 0 else 0.0\n\n        self.results = {\n            "initial_balance": self.initial_balance,\n            "final_balance": self.final_balance,\n            "total_return": self.total_return,\n            "max_drawdown": self.max_drawdown,\n            "total_trades": self.total_trades,\n            "win_rate": self.win_rate,\n            "trades": self.trades,\n            "equity_curve": self.equity_curve\n        }\n        return self.results\n\n    def report(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Return the backtest results.\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        return self.results\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. Command Engineer2.write_new_code executed: The file /home/metagpt-fuzzing/Desktop/MetaGPT/workspace/custom_trading_bot/storage.py has been successfully created, with content:
import os
import json
import csv
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Union
from pydantic import BaseModel
import threading

class Storage:
    """
    Storage utilities for saving and loading persistent data such as logs, trades, and configuration.
    Supports JSON and CSV formats as needed.
    Thread-safe for concurrent access.
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

    def save_json(self, data: Union[Dict, List], path: str):
        """
        Save a dictionary or list to a JSON file.
        """
        with self._lock:
            with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

    def load_json(self, path: str) -> Union[Dict, List]:
        """
        Load a dictionary or list from a JSON file.
        """
        if not os.path.exists(path):
            raise FileNotFoundError(f"JSON file not found: {path}")
        with self._lock:
            with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                return json.load(f)

    def save_csv(self, data: List[Dict[str, Any]], path: str, fieldnames: Optional[List[str]] = None):
        """
        Save a list of dictionaries to a CSV file.
        """
        if not data:
            raise ValueError("No data to save to CSV.")
        with self._lock:
            if fieldnames is None:
                fieldnames = list(data[0].keys())
            with open(path, "w", newline='', encoding="utf-8") as f:
                writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
                writer.writeheader()
                for row in data:
                    writer.writerow(row)

    def load_csv(self, path: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """
        Load a list of dictionaries from a CSV file.
        """
        if not os.path.exists(path):
            raise FileNotFoundError(f"CSV file not found: {path}")
        with self._lock:
            with open(path, "r", newline='', encoding="utf-8") as f:
                reader = csv.DictReader(f)
                return [row for row in reader]

    def save_model(self, model: BaseModel, path: str):
        """
        Save a pydantic model to a JSON file.
        """
        self.save_json(model.dict(), path)

    def load_model(self, model_class: Any, path: str) -> BaseModel:
        """
        Load a pydantic model from a JSON file.
        """
        data = self.load_json(path)
        return model_class.parse_obj(data)

    def append_json(self, item: Dict, path: str):
        """
        Append a dictionary item to a JSON file containing a list.
        """
        with self._lock:
            if os.path.exists(path):
                data = self.load_json(path)
                if not isinstance(data, list):
                    raise ValueError("JSON file does not contain a list.")
            else:
                data = []
            data.append(item)
            self.save_json(data, path)

    def append_csv(self, item: Dict[str, Any], path: str, fieldnames: Optional[List[str]] = None):
        """
        Append a dictionary item to a CSV file.
        """
        with self._lock:
            file_exists = os.path.exists(path)
            if not fieldnames:
                fieldnames = list(item.keys())
            with open(path, "a", newline='', encoding="utf-8") as f:
                writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
                if not file_exists:
                    writer.writeheader()
                writer.writerow(item)

Default to EMA\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", {})\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", {"buy": 0, "sell": 0})\n        self.last_signal: Optional[str] = None\n\n    def update_params(self, params: Dict[str, Any]):\n        self.params.update(params)\n        self.indicator = self.params.get("indicator", self.indicator)\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", self.indicator_params)\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", self.signal_thresholds)\n\n    def generate_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        """\n        Generate trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\') based on selected trend indicator.\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data, must contain \'close\' column.\n        :return: Signal string\n        """\n        if data is None or len(data) < 2 or "close" not in data.columns:\n            return "neutral"\n\n        if self.indicator == "EMA":\n            return self._ema_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "SMA":\n            return self._sma_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "MACD":\n            return self._macd_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "RSI":\n            return self._rsi_signal(data)\n        else:\n            # Default fallback\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _ema_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        ema = data["close"].ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_ema = ema.iloc[-2]\n        curr_ema = ema.iloc[-1]\n        # Signal: price crosses above EMA -> long, below -> short\n        if price > curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_ema:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_ema:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _sma_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        sma = data["close"].rolling(window=period).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_sma = sma.iloc[-2]\n        curr_sma = sma.iloc[-1]\n        if price > curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_sma:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_sma:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _macd_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        fast_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("fast_period", 12))\n        slow_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("slow_period", 26))\n        signal_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("signal_period", 9))\n        close = data["close"]\n        ema_fast = close.ewm(span=fast_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        ema_slow = close.ewm(span=slow_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        macd = ema_fast - ema_slow\n        signal = macd.ewm(span=signal_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        prev_macd = macd.iloc[-2] - signal.iloc[-2]\n        curr_macd = macd.iloc[-1] - signal.iloc[-1]\n        # MACD crosses above signal -> long, below -> short\n        if prev_macd < 0 and curr_macd > 0:\n            return "long"\n        elif prev_macd > 0 and curr_macd < 0:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _rsi_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 14))\n        close = data["close"]\n        delta = close.diff()\n        gain = (delta.where(delta > 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        loss = (-delta.where(delta < 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        rs = gain / (loss + 1e-9)\n        rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))\n        curr_rsi = rsi.iloc[-1]\n        buy_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("buy", 30))\n        sell_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("sell", 70))\n        if curr_rsi < buy_th:\n            return "long"\n        elif curr_rsi > sell_th:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. Optional[Dict[str, Any]], signal: str) -> bool:\n        """\n        Check if a new trade is allowed based on risk parameters.\n        :param position: Current position dict for the symbol (can be None if no position)\n        :param signal: Trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\')\n        :return: True if trade is allowed, False otherwise\n        """\n        # If no signal, do not trade\n        if signal not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Signal is neutral, no trade.")\n            return False\n\n        # If no position, allow trade\n        if position   if position_size >= self.max_position_size:\n            self.logger.warning(f"Position size {position_size} exceeds max {self.max_position_size}.")\n            return False\n\n        # Check 0\n        if entry_value > 0:\n            drawdown = -unrealized_pnl / entry_value\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.logger.warning(f"Drawdown {drawdown:.2%} exceeds max {self.max_drawdown:.2%}.")\n                return False\n\n        self.logger.info("Risk check passed, trade allowed.")\n        return True\n\n    def apply_stop_loss(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n        """\n        Check if stop-loss should be triggered for the position.\n        :param position: Current position dict\n        :return: True if stop-loss should be triggered, False otherwise\n        """\n        entry_price = float(position.get("entryPrice", 0))\n        current_price = float(position.get("markPrice", 0))\n        side = position.get("side", "").lower()\n        if entry_price == 0 or current_price == 0 or side not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Insufficient data for stop-loss check.")\n            return False\n\n self.logger.info(f"Stop-loss triggered for {side} position at price {current_price}.")\n        return stop_loss_triggered\n\n    def apply_take_profit(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n Uses polling via ccxt for CoinDCX Futures.\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, poll_interval: float = 2.0):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger("DataFeed")\n        self.symbols: List[str] = []\n self._thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None\n        self._exchange: Optional[ccxt.coincdx] = None\n\n    def subscribe(self, symbols: List[str]):\n        """\n        Subscribe to a list of trading symbols.\n        """\n        self.symbols = list(set(self.symbols) | set(symbols))\n        self.logger.info(f"Subscribed to symbols: {self.symbols}")\n\n    def set_exchange(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx):\n        """\n        Set the ccxt exchange client for data fetching.\n        """\n        self._exchange = exchange\n\n    def get_latest(self, symbol: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Get the latest OHLCV data for a symbol.\n        """\n        if symbol in self.latest_data:\n            return self.latest_data[symbol]\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f"No data available for symbol: {symbol}")\n\n    def on_update(self, callback: Callable[[str], None]):\n        """\n        Register a callback to be called when new data is available for a symbol.\n        The callback receives the symbol as argument.\n        """\n        self.callbacks.append(callback)\n\n    def _fetch_ohlcv(self, symbol: str, timeframe: str = "1m", limit: int = 100) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Fetch OHLCV data for a symbol using ccxt.\n        """\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client not set in DataFeed.")\n        try:\n            ohlcv = self._exchange.fetch_ohlcv(symbol, timeframe=timeframe, limit=limit)\n            df = pd.DataFrame(ohlcv, columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", self._fetch_ohlcv(symbol)\n                if not df.empty:\n                    prev_df = self.latest_data.get(symbol)\n                    # Only trigger update if new data is available\n                           cb(symbol)\n                            except Exception as e:\n                                self.logger.error(f"Error in data update callback for {symbol}: {e}")\n            time.sleep(self.poll_interval)\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed polling loop stopped.")\n\n    def start(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx = None):\n        """\n        Start the data feed polling loop in a background thread.\n        Optionally set the exchange client.\n        """\n        if exchange:\n            self.set_exchange(exchange)\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client must be set before starting DataFeed.")\n        if self._running:\n            self.logger.warning("DataFeed already running.")\n            return\n        self._running = True\n        self._thread = threading.Thread(target=self._polling_loop, daemon=True)\n        self._thread.start()\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed started.")\n\n    def stop(self):\n        """\n        Stop the data feed polling loop.\n        """\n        self._running = False\n        if self._thread:\n            self._thread.join()\n            self._thread = Default initial balance for backtest\n        self.final_balance: float = self.initial_balance\n        self.max_drawdown: float = 0.0\n        self.total_return: float = 0.0\n        self.win_rate: float = 0.0\n        self.total_trades: int = 0\n        self.profitable_trades: int = 0\n\n    def run(self, strategy: TrendStrategy, data: pd.DataFrame, risk: RiskManager) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Run backtest for the given strategy and data, using the provided risk manager.\n        :param strategy: TrendStrategy instance\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data\n        :param risk: RiskManager instance\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        balance = self.initial_balance\n        position = None\n        entry_price = 0.0\n        position_side = None\n        position_size = 0.0\n        self.trades = []\n        self.equity_curve = [balance]\n        self.max_drawdown = 0.0\n        self.total_trades = 0\n        self.profitable_trades = 0\n\n        for i in range(1, len(data)):\n            window = data.iloc[:i+1]\n            signal = strategy.generate_signal(window)\n            price = window["close"].iloc[-1]\n            timestamp = window["timestamp"].iloc[-1] if "timestamp" in window.columns else i\n\n            # Simulate position management\n            if position is None and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                # Open new position\n                position = {\n                    "side": signal,\n                    "entryPrice": price,\n                    "markPrice": price,\n                    "contracts": 1,\n                    "timestamp": timestamp\n                }\n                entry_price = price\n                position_side = signal\n                position_size = 1\n                self.total_trades += 1\n            elif position is not None:\n                # Update mark price\n                position["markPrice"] = price\n\n                # Check for stop-loss/take-profit\n                stop_loss_triggered = risk.apply_stop_loss(position)\n                take_profit_triggered = risk.apply_take_profit(position)\n\n                # Close position if triggered or opposite signal\n                close_position = False\n                reason = ""\n                if stop_loss_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "stop_loss"\n                elif take_profit_triggered:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "take_profit"\n                elif signal != position_side and signal in ["long", "short"]:\n                    close_position = True\n                    reason = "signal_flip"\n\n                if close_position:\n                    # Calculate PnL\n                    pnl = 0.0\n                    if position_side == "long":\n                        pnl = (price - entry_price) * position_size\n                    elif position_side == "short":\n                        pnl = (entry_price - price) * position_size\n                    balance += pnl\n                    self.trades.append({\n                        "entry_price": entry_price,\n                        "exit_price": price,\n                        "side": position_side,\n                        "pnl": pnl,\n                        "reason": reason,\n                        "entry_time": position["timestamp"],\n                        "exit_time": timestamp\n                    })\n                    if pnl > 0:\n                        self.profitable_trades += 1\n                    position = None\n                    entry_price = 0.0\n                    position_side = None\n                    position_size = 0.0\n\n            self.equity_curve.append(balance)\n            # Update max drawdown\n            peak = max(self.equity_curve)\n            drawdown = (peak - balance) / peak if peak > 0 else 0\n            if drawdown > self.max_drawdown:\n                self.max_drawdown = drawdown\n\n        self.final_balance = balance\n        self.total_return = (self.final_balance - self.initial_balance) / self.initial_balance\n        self.win_rate = (self.profitable_trades / self.total_trades) if self.total_trades > 0 else 0.0\n\n        self.results = {\n            "initial_balance": self.initial_balance,\n            "final_balance": self.final_balance,\n            "total_return": self.total_return,\n            "max_drawdown": self.max_drawdown,\n            "total_trades": self.total_trades,\n            "win_rate": self.win_rate,\n            "trades": self.trades,\n            "equity_curve": self.equity_curve\n        }\n        return self.results\n\n    def report(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        """\n        Return the backtest results.\n        :return: Results dictionary\n        """\n        return self.results\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. Determine order parameters\n                side = "buy" if signal == "long" else "sell"\n                qty = config.strategy_params.get("position_size", 1.0)\n                price = data.iloc[-1]["close"]\n                order_type = config.strategy_params.get("order_type", "market")\n                order = exchange.place_order(symbol, side, qty, price, order_type)\n                monitor.log_trade(order)\n                notifier.send_push(f"Trade executed: {order}")\n            else:\n                monitor.alert(f"Risk check failed for {symbol} with signal {signal}")\n                notifier.send_push(f"Risk event: {symbol} signal {signal} blocked by risk manager")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"Error in data update for {symbol}: {e}")\n\n    # BotConfig(BaseModel):\n    api_key: str = Field(..., description="CoinDCX API key")\n    api_secret: str = Field(..., description="CoinDCX API secret")\n    strategy_params: Dict[str, Any] = @classmethod\n    def load(cls, path: str, encryption_key: str = None) -> "BotConfig":\n        if not os.path.exists(path):\n            raise FileNotFoundError(f"Config file not found: {path}")\n indent=2)\n        if encryption_key:\n            fernet = Fernet(encryption_key)\n            data = fernet.encrypt(data.encode("utf-8"))\n            with open(path, "wb") as f:\n                f.write(data)\n        else:\n            with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:\n                f.write(data)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def generate_encryption_key() -> str:\n        return Default to EMA\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", {})\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", {"buy": 0, "sell": 0})\n        self.last_signal: Optional[str] = None\n\n    def update_params(self, params: Dict[str, Any]):\n        self.params.update(params)\n        self.indicator = self.params.get("indicator", self.indicator)\n        self.indicator_params = self.params.get("indicator_params", self.indicator_params)\n        self.signal_thresholds = self.params.get("signal_thresholds", self.signal_thresholds)\n\n    def generate_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        """\n        Generate trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\') based on selected trend indicator.\n        :param data: pd.DataFrame with OHLCV data, must contain \'close\' column.\n        :return: Signal string\n        """\n        if data is None or len(data) < 2 or "close" not in data.columns:\n            return "neutral"\n\n        if self.indicator == "EMA":\n            return self._ema_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "SMA":\n            return self._sma_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "MACD":\n            return self._macd_signal(data)\n        elif self.indicator == "RSI":\n            return self._rsi_signal(data)\n        else:\n            # Default fallback\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _ema_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        ema = data["close"].ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_ema = ema.iloc[-2]\n        curr_ema = ema.iloc[-1]\n        # Signal: price crosses above EMA -> long, below -> short\n        if price > curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_ema:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_ema and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_ema:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _sma_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 20))\n        sma = data["close"].rolling(window=period).mean()\n        price = data["close"].iloc[-1]\n        prev_sma = sma.iloc[-2]\n        curr_sma = sma.iloc[-1]\n        if price > curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] <= prev_sma:\n            return "long"\n        elif price < curr_sma and data["close"].iloc[-2] >= prev_sma:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _macd_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        fast_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("fast_period", 12))\n        slow_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("slow_period", 26))\n        signal_period = int(self.indicator_params.get("signal_period", 9))\n        close = data["close"]\n        ema_fast = close.ewm(span=fast_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        ema_slow = close.ewm(span=slow_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        macd = ema_fast - ema_slow\n        signal = macd.ewm(span=signal_period, adjust=False).mean()\n        prev_macd = macd.iloc[-2] - signal.iloc[-2]\n        curr_macd = macd.iloc[-1] - signal.iloc[-1]\n        # MACD crosses above signal -> long, below -> short\n        if prev_macd < 0 and curr_macd > 0:\n            return "long"\n        elif prev_macd > 0 and curr_macd < 0:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\n    def _rsi_signal(self, data: pd.DataFrame) -> str:\n        period = int(self.indicator_params.get("period", 14))\n        close = data["close"]\n        delta = close.diff()\n        gain = (delta.where(delta > 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        loss = (-delta.where(delta < 0, 0)).rolling(window=period).mean()\n        rs = gain / (loss + 1e-9)\n        rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))\n        curr_rsi = rsi.iloc[-1]\n        buy_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("buy", 30))\n        sell_th = float(self.signal_thresholds.get("sell", 70))\n        if curr_rsi < buy_th:\n            return "long"\n        elif curr_rsi > sell_th:\n            return "short"\n        else:\n            return "neutral"\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished. None if no position)\n        :param signal: Trading signal (\'long\', \'short\', \'neutral\')\n        :return: True if trade is allowed, False otherwise\n        """\n        # If no signal, do not trade\n        if signal not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Signal is neutral, no trade.")\n            return False\n\n        # If no position, allow trade\n        if position "").lower()\n        if entry_price == 0 or current_price == 0 or side not in ["long", "short"]:\n            self.logger.info("Insufficient data for stop-loss check.")\n            return False\n\n self.logger.info(f"Stop-loss triggered for {side} position at price {current_price}.")\n        return stop_loss_triggered\n\n    def apply_take_profit(self, position: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n Uses polling via ccxt for CoinDCX Futures.\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, poll_interval: float = 2.0):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger("DataFeed")\n        self.symbols: List[str] = []\n        self.callbacks: List[Callable[[str], None]] = []\n        self.latest_data: Dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}\n        self.poll_interval = poll_interval\n        self._running = False\n        self._thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None\n        self._exchange: Optional[ccxt.coincdx] = None\n\n    def subscribe(self, symbols: List[str]):\n        """\n        Subscribe to a list of trading symbols.\n        """\n        self.symbols = list(set(self.symbols) | set(symbols))\n        self.logger.info(f"Subscribed to symbols: {self.symbols}")\n\n    def set_exchange(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx):\n        """\n        Set the ccxt exchange client for data fetching.\n        """\n        self._exchange = exchange\n\n    def get_latest(self, symbol: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Get the latest OHLCV data for a symbol.\n        """\n        if symbol in self.latest_data:\n            return self.latest_data[symbol]\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f"No data available for symbol: {symbol}")\n\n    def on_update(self, callback: Callable[[str], None]):\n        """\n        Register a callback to be called when new data is available for a symbol.\n        The callback receives the symbol as argument.\n        """\n        self.callbacks.append(callback)\n\n    def _fetch_ohlcv(self, symbol: str, timeframe: str = "1m", limit: int = 100) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        """\n        Fetch OHLCV data for a symbol using ccxt.\n        """\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client not set in DataFeed.")\n        try:\n            ohlcv = self._exchange.fetch_ohlcv(symbol, timeframe=timeframe, limit=limit)\n            df = pd.DataFrame(ohlcv, columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"])\n            df["timestamp"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"], unit="ms")\n            return df\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"Error fetching OHLCV for {symbol}: {e}")\n            return pd.DataFrame(columns=["timestamp", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"])\n\n    def _polling_loop(self):\n        """\n        Polling loop to fetch data and self._fetch_ohlcv(symbol)\n                if not df.empty:\n                    prev_df = self.latest_data.get(symbol)\n                    # Only trigger update if new data is available\n                    if prev_df is None or not df.equals(prev_df):\n                        self.latest_data[symbol] = df\n                        for cb in self.callbacks:\n                            try:\n                                cb(symbol)\n                            except Exception as e:\n                                self.logger.error(f"Error in data update callback for {symbol}: {e}")\n            time.sleep(self.poll_interval)\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed polling loop stopped.")\n\n    def start(self, exchange: ccxt.coincdx = None):\n        """\n        Start the data feed polling loop in a background thread.\n        Optionally set the exchange client.\n        """\n        if exchange:\n            self.set_exchange(exchange)\n        if not self._exchange:\n            raise RuntimeError("Exchange client must be set before starting DataFeed.")\n        if self._running:\n            self.logger.warning("DataFeed already running.")\n            return\n        self._running = True\n        self._thread = threading.Thread(target=self._polling_loop, daemon=True)\n        self._thread.start()\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed started.")\n\n    def stop(self):\n        """\n        Stop the data feed polling loop.\n        """\n        self._running = False\n        if self._thread:\n            self._thread.join()\n            self._thread = None\n        self.logger.info("DataFeed stopped.")\n\nCommand Plan.finish_current_task executed:Current task is finished.
